caveats: Lower bound is proven. Upper bound is achievable upon completion of runtime execution assessment.
explanation: When execution_layer_evaluated=False, confidence status is SPLIT_EXECUTION_NOT_EVALUATED. Lower bound = canonical score (proven floor). Upper bound = projected score (ceiling). When execution is evaluated, lower=upper=single resolved score and status=COMPUTED. The raw status string is operator-only; LENS phrase: "Score confidence range: 60 to 100. Floor is proven. Ceiling is achievable upon execution assessment."
